description_long: This object is a hanging potted plant featuring a spherical wooden planter suspended by three brown ropes converging at a central hook. The planter is densely covered with overlapping green leaves and adorned with several large, round, pink flowers with yellow centers, distributed evenly around its surface. The wooden slats of the pot are visible between the foliage, giving it a rustic, natural appearance. The ropes are securely attached to the pot, suggesting it is designed to be hung from a ceiling, beam, or outdoor structure. The plant appears lush and healthy, with the leaves and flowers arranged to maximize visual appeal from all angles. There are no visible labels, drainage holes, or additional decorative elements on the pot itself.
description: A spherical hanging wooden planter with lush green leaves and large pink flowers, suspended by three brown ropes. The rustic pot is densely covered with foliage and blooms, designed for display from all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wooden slats of the pot, three ropes converging at the top, and several pink flowers and green leaves prominently displayed.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the planter, with the ropes meeting at the hook and a clear view of the central pink flower surrounded by foliage.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the roundness of the pot, the layered leaves, and the even distribution of pink flowers around the surface.
description_view_3: This angle shows the wooden slats more clearly, with the ropes and foliage forming a balanced, symmetrical arrangement around the pot.
